scope_creep.notes: The RAG vs. fine-tuning subsection teaches fine-tuning's mechanics beyond a single mention, but this is within scope because the topic title's decision framework explicitly requires the contrast (IBM primary source [1] frames the topic as a RAG-vs-fine-tuning decision). The fine-tuning coverage stays at the 'what problem it solves' level and does not drill into training procedures, hyperparameters, or implementation — it remains part of the when-to-use-RAG decision framework.
